description.ko: 시간과 빛이 우주 심연의 절대적인 침묵 속으로 녹아드는 우주의 가장 먼 곳을 탐사하며, 그곳을 지키는 침묵의 감시자 보이드-3의 모습을 담았습니다.
description.en: An exploration of the furthest reaches of space where time and light dissolve into the absolute silence of the cosmic deep, featuring the silent sentinel VOID-3.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of VOID-3, a monolithic obsidian vessel drifting through the cosmic deep, surrounded by swirling dark matter and distant nebulae in shades of deep indigo and violet, ethereal starlight refracting through crystalline structures, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, photorealistic, mysterious atmosphere, cold aesthetic.
